hero.title: Electrical, plumbing, climate control, alarms and cameras for homes and businesses
hero.body: Instal Berrozpe focuses on three clear technical service lines: electrical and home automation, plumbing and climate control, and alarms and cameras. Direct contact from Blanes by phone, WhatsApp, email or form.

servicesOverview.title: Three main services to solve technical installations with a clear scope
servicesOverview.body: The current offer is organised into three work areas that cover electrical installations, water and climate systems, and security solutions through one installation company in Blanes.

whyChooseUs.title: A close technical company with direct contact and integrated service
whyChooseUs.body: The current Instal Berrozpe base communicates a direct way of working: one contact point, connected technical services and support for both homes and businesses.
items: Three clearly defined service lines covering electrical work, water and climate systems, and security.
Direct contact by mobile, phone, WhatsApp, email and form from Blanes.
Services presented for homes and businesses depending on the type of installation.
A clear route from the initial enquiry to the technical intervention.

process.title: A clear process from enquiry to intervention
process.body: The website presents a simple flow: explain the need, review the right solution and move forward with the installation or technical work required.
items: You explain the need by phone, WhatsApp or form.
The most suitable service line is reviewed for the home or business.
The installation or technical intervention is coordinated.
The follow-up channel stays open to resolve the enquiry.

contactCta.title: Talk to Instal Berrozpe and explain your installation with the right context
contactCta.body: You can get in touch for electrical and home automation, plumbing and climate control, or alarms and cameras. The entry point can be phone, WhatsApp, email or form.

faqs.title: Common questions before requesting information or a quote
faqs.body: These answers help visitors identify the right service and prepare a clearer enquiry from the first contact.
items: Instal Berrozpe works on projects for homes and businesses.
An enquiry can be sent by form, phone, email or WhatsApp.
If you are not sure which service fits best, the contact page is the best starting point.
